title: Cryptic's Plushies
description: This mod added plushies which can be collected to make your world look nicer
body:
# Currently in the mod
- 0 Common Plushies
- 4 Uncommon Plushies
- 2 Rare Plushies
## How you get the Plushies
- Structure Chest
- Mob Drops
- Fishing and otherways
##   What I am working on
- Variants of the current Plushies
- Working on making the next update (Villager Age)
###   Rarities
- Common High chance to find in villagers or in shipwrecks
- Uncommon has three different ways to obtain. One has a high chance, and the others have a low chance
- Rare can only be found in one place or very rarely 

<details>
<summary>Technical Support</summary>
If you have any problems, contact me on Discord (Crypticknight) or email me (CrypticmoddingS@gmail.com)
</details>
